DESC: This Notice of Intent is provided to advise that the Government intends to solicit and negotiate a sole source, Firm Fixed Price Requirements Contract with only one source, Petnet Solutions, Inc. to provide Axumin (Flucicovin F-18) to the Minneapolis VA Health Care System.
EM: Synopsis and Notification of Pending RFP Release
LOCATION: Department of Veterans Affairs Medical Center
OFFADD: Department of Veterans Affairs;NETWORK 23 CONTRACTING OFFICE;Contract Officer;4801 Veterans Drive;St. Cloud MN  56303
P: 411th Contracting Support Brigade (CSB), Korea intends to issue a full and open competition solicitation for the purchase of four (4) 2020 SUV 4WD / Automatic Transmission, Mid-Size Sports Utility Vehicles (SUV), Non-Tactical vehicles for the use of military personnel under the United States Forces Korea (USFK) on USAG Humphreys and Area III.
POPADDRESS: Primary training areas in Germany and/or in countries agreed upon by user organization and contractor throughout Europe.
